PVC film, tarpaulin and flexible packaging machinery built for export projects

Hongyi Machinery designs gravure printing, laminating, coating and winding lines for buyers who need stable output, practical engineering support and clear quotation details.

Request a quote Products

Machines for film, tarpaulin and synthetic leather plants

Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

Gravure Printing Machine

PVC, PE, BOPP, CPP, flexible film and cloth

PVC film, tarpaulin, tent fabric and flex banner

Furniture Film Laminating Machine

PVC decorative film, wood grain film and edge banding film

Calender Winder

PVC, PE, semi-rigid film and rigid film

Machinery engineering from Foshan since 1998

Foshan Gaoming Hongyi Machinery Co., Ltd. has a 60,000 m2 Foshan production base and export experience in film, PVC, tarpaulin and synthetic leather machinery.
